items.a: No — every piece is hand-crocheted from premium yarn. They're designed to look and feel like real flowers, but they never wilt, never need water, and last for years with basic care.

items.q: Can I fully customize my bouquet?
items.a: Yes. The Booking page walks you through choosing your own main flowers, filler flowers, foliage, and colors — or you can pick a curated template, or let us surprise you based on your budget and occasion.

items.q: How long does a custom order take to make?
items.a: Most custom bouquets are handmade within 5–7 business days. Templates and in-stock single stems usually ship faster — check the specific item's availability on its detail page.

items.q: Can I change my order after placing it?
items.a: If your order hasn't entered production yet, contact us as soon as possible through the Contact page with your order number and we'll do our best to accommodate changes.

items.q: What delivery options do you offer?
items.a: Standard delivery (3–5 business days, free), Express delivery (next day, $9.99), or in-store Pickup, all selectable at checkout.
Right now we ship within the country only. If you're ordering from abroad, reach out through the Contact page and we'll see what we can work out.
Every bouquet is wrapped by hand in premium paper and shipped in a protective box so the crochet work arrives exactly as it left our hands.

items.q: How do I take care of my crochet flowers?
items.a: Keep them out of direct sunlight for long periods to preserve color, and dust gently with a soft brush every so often. No water, no sunlight requirements, no maintenance schedule needed.

items.q: Will the colors fade over time?
items.a: Our yarns are colorfast for normal indoor use. Years of direct, intense sunlight can lighten any dyed material, so we recommend keeping arrangements away from a sun-facing window if you want colors to stay vivid indefinitely.

items.q: Can I wash them if they get dusty?
items.a: Spot-clean only with a barely damp cloth. Avoid submerging the piece in water, since some components are wired or glued for shape.

Unused, undamaged items can be returned within 14 days of delivery. Fully customized bouquets are made-to-order and are final sale unless there's a defect — if something arrives damaged, contact us and we'll make it right.

items.q: My order arrived damaged — what do I do?
items.a: Please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with a photo of the issue and your order number, and we'll arrange a replacement or refund.

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: Sign in and visit your Dashboard to see every order you've placed and its current status.
